findings.title: Reflected XSS in search parameter
findings.description: The search parameter is reflected without sanitization, allowing XSS.
findings.poc:
1. Navigate to /search?q=<script>alert(document.cookie)</script>
2. Cookie is alerted in browser
findings.impact: Attacker can steal session cookies and hijack accounts.

findings.title: SQL Injection in login form
findings.description: The username field is vulnerable to SQL injection.
findings.poc:
1. Enter: admin' OR '1'='1'-- in username field
2. Any password works
findings.impact: Authentication bypass, full database read/write access.

findings.title: CORS Misconfiguration - Wildcard Origin
findings.description: API accepts requests from any origin with credentials.
findings.impact: Sensitive user data exposed to malicious sites.

findings.title: Subdomain Takeover - GitHub Pages
findings.description: staging.example.com CNAME points to unclaimed GitHub Pages.
findings.poc:
1. dig CNAME staging.example.com → username.github.io
2. Repository not found
findings.impact: Phishing, credential harvesting under trusted domain.
